title: Hunza Tour
shortDescription: A compact Hunza experience covering Attabad Lake, Altit Fort, and Passu viewpoints.
fullDescription: This 5-day Hunza package is designed for travelers who want iconic landscapes, comfortable stays, and balanced sightseeing. The route includes scenic drives on the Karakoram Highway, cultural visits to heritage forts, and photo stops at lakes and mountain passes.

itinerary.title: Islamabad to Chilas
itinerary.description: Departure from Islamabad, highway travel with rest stops, and overnight stay in Chilas.

itinerary.title: Chilas to Hunza
itinerary.description: Drive to Hunza with viewpoints at Rakaposhi and Karimabad market exploration.

itinerary.title: Hunza Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Visit Altit and Baltit forts, Eagle's Nest sunset, and local cuisine experience.

itinerary.title: Passu and Attabad
itinerary.description: Day excursion to Passu Cones, Hussaini Bridge area, and Attabad Lake boating.

itinerary.title: Return Journey
itinerary.description: Travel back with planned breaks and final drop-off at Islamabad.

preparations: Pack layered clothing for changing temperatures
Keep a power bank and charging cable
precautions: Follow guide instructions near rivers and bridges
terms: Rooms are subject to hotel availability
Meals not mentioned in facilities are excluded

title: Skardu Tour
shortDescription: A full Skardu expedition featuring lakes, desert landscapes, and heritage forts.
fullDescription: This 7-day Skardu tour is crafted for guests who want deep exploration of Baltistan's signature attractions. It combines valley drives, relaxed sightseeing, and cultural immersion with comfortable lodging and guide-led planning.

itinerary.title: Islamabad to Naran
itinerary.description: Road travel from Islamabad to Naran with scenic stops along the route.

itinerary.title: Naran to Skardu
itinerary.description: Long scenic drive via mountain passes and arrival in Skardu.

itinerary.title: Upper Kachura and Shangrila
itinerary.description: Visit Upper Kachura Lake and Shangrila Resort with leisure time.

itinerary.title: Shigar Valley
itinerary.description: Explore Shigar Fort, valley villages, and local handicraft spots.

itinerary.title: Sarfaranga and Cold Desert
itinerary.description: Desert safari area visit and sunset viewpoints around Skardu.

itinerary.title: Skardu to Naran
itinerary.description: Begin return journey and overnight stay in Naran.

itinerary.title: Naran to Islamabad
itinerary.description: Final return with refreshment stops and drop-off.

preparations: Bring warm layers and windproof jacket
precautions: Respect local culture and dress norms
Inform guide about health conditions in advance
terms: Tour may shift due to road and weather conditions
Entry tickets are not included unless specified
Cancellation policy applies as per booking agreement

title: Naran Kaghan Tour
shortDescription: A quick mountain escape featuring river views and alpine landscapes.
fullDescription: The Naran Kaghan 3-day package is ideal for short vacations and weekend breaks. It includes comfortable travel from Islamabad, major sightseeing points, and a relaxed itinerary for families or friend groups.

itinerary.title: Islamabad to Naran
itinerary.description: Departure early morning, route sightseeing, and check-in at Naran.

itinerary.title: Saif ul Malook and Kaghan
itinerary.description: Excursion to lake area and nearby valleys with photography stops.

itinerary.title: Naran to Islamabad
itinerary.description: Return to Islamabad with lunch and rest breaks on the way.

preparations: Pack rain cover during monsoon season
precautions: Avoid standing near high-flow river edges
Keep children supervised at all scenic points
terms: Rates may vary in peak season

title: One Day Trip
shortDescription: A single-day scenic break with light activities and easy travel.
fullDescription: This one-day package is suitable for travelers looking for a quick and affordable getaway from Islamabad. It includes selected viewpoints, chairlift area access, and enough free time for dining and local shopping.

itinerary.title: City Departure and Scenic Loop
itinerary.description: Morning departure, hill viewpoints, Patriata visit, lunch break, and evening return.

precautions: Stay with group during crowded stops
terms: Final route may adjust due to traffic
